title: Hat Club
description: Purely server-side or singleplayer. Dyeable, enchantable, repairable, protective hats with fun acquiring mechanics.
body:
[![CurseForge](https://i.imgur.com/eBmLp7F.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mjramon) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/FMq4hOj.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/aegis-architectum) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/v0q5sfn.png)](https://discord.gg/fWW4Atmr69)

![Hat Club](https://i.imgur.com/uz8BgUz.png)


_Purely server-side or singleplayer.\
Dyeable, enchantable, repairable, protective hats with fun acquiring mechanics._


![Fun Mechanics](https://i.imgur.com/e8olbCT.png)

## FEATURES
- Tiered by rarity: collect them all!
- Same properties as diamond helmet.
- Can be repaired with leather.
- Can be enchanted.
- Selection of dyeable hats.
- Wandering trader offers "Mysterious Hat" loot bags.
- Mysterious Hat: contains one random hat. On use rolls a random hat from a loot table based on entry weight.
- No overrides: should work with other mods and datapacks.


![Make it your own](https://i.imgur.com/jxN4i4W.png)

## TECH DETAILS
- Optimized for 2x1 and 2x2 eyes, adjusted for skin overlay layer offset.
- Hat rarity corresponds to its drop chance.
- Fully translatable.
- Villager hats use vanilla textures.
- Tagged as "minecraft:head_armor", "hatclub:hats" and "c:hats".
- Separate creative tab.
- Clean approach: no console errors.
- Everything is data-driven.

## REQUIREMENTS (server side / singleplayer)
- [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)
- [Filament](https://modrinth.com/mod/filament)
- Enable "AutoHost" in Polymer config. [See how to](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/).


## RECOMMENDATIONS
- [Simple Datapacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-datapacks)


## LINKS
